KOMEIJIKOISHI-STRIKE_KOISHI.title: Strike
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DEFEND_KOISHI.title: Defend
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROAMING_KOISHI.title: Roaming
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROAMING_KOISHI.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Randomly grant {Amount:diff()} cards in hand [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
CARD.KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROAMING_KOISHI.prompt: Choose a card to grant Unconscious.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ARTWORK_KOISHI.title: Artwork
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ARTWORK_KOISHI.flavor: A masterpiece combining offense and defense.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-COMPLETE_UNCONSCIOUS_KOISH: Fully unconscious — no one knows what will happen.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ULTIMATE_UNCONSCIOUS_FORM_: Whenever you play a card yourself, automatically play {FormAmount:diff()} [gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards from hand. Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
Seal your conscious mind and let instinct control every battle.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_BLOOM_KOISHI.title: Rose Bloom
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_CLOSED_KOISHI.title: Heart's Closing
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOMEIJI_SPIN_KOISHI.title: Komeiji Spin
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOMEIJI_SPIN_KOISHI.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FETUS_DREAM_KOISHI.title: Fetus Dream
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FETUS_DREAM_KOISHI.descrip: For this combat, cards with 'Unconscious' in their name are also treated as [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Heart Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STAR_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Star Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RICE_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Rice Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RICE_DANMAKU_KOISHI.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add a copy of this card to the Exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ARROW_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Arrow Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-NON_SPELL_CARD_KOISHI.desc: Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS_DANMAKU_ATTACK: Randomly generate and automatically play {Cards:diff()} [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards.
Danmaku duels should begin with mutual consent — but these bullets fly without thought.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUBCONSCIOUS_RELEASE_KOISH: Randomly play {Cards:diff()} [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards from your Exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-REACTION_YOUKAI_POLYGRAPH_:
Enter [gold]Bloom[/gold] stance.
If the target enemy intends to attack, draw {Draw:diff()} cards.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENTER_DREAM_KOISHI.selecti: Choose 1 card to take into hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENTER_DREAM_KOISHI.title: Enter Dream
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENTER_DREAM_KOISHI.descrip: Enter [gold]Closed[/gold] stance. Choose 1 card from your discard pile and put it into your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_ANGER_KOISHI.title: Heart's Wrath
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_ANGER_KOISHI.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Enter [gold]Bloom[/gold] stance. If in [gold]Closed[/gold] stance, this costs 1.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_PARANOIA_KOISHI.de: Exhaust all non-[gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards in hand. For each card Exhausted, add a random [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_ART_KOISHI.title: Danmaku Art
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_ART_KOISHI.descrip: Whenever you play a [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card, gain {ArtAmount:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_RORSCHACH_KOISHI.d: Play all [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards from your hand, draw pile, discard pile, and exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RECOGNIZED_GENIUS_KOISHI.d:
All [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards are upgraded.
All 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal {KuugaPower:diff()} more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ANCESTORS_DREAM_KOISHI.des: Copy all cards in your Exhaust pile and add the copies to your Exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUPEREGO_KOISHI.title: Inhibition: Superego
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUPEREGO_KOISHI.descriptio: When entering [gold]Closed[/gold], draw 1 extra card. When entering [gold]Bloom[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra energy.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BURIED_FIRE_KOISHI.title: Rekindled: Koishi's Buried Flame
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BURIED_FIRE_KOISHI.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your discard pile. For each card played this way, apply {Tracing:diff()} [gold]Traced[/gold] to all enemies.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STINGING_MIND_KOISHI.title: Piercing Consciousness
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STINGING_MIND_KOISHI.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Randomly play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Rose Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_HELL_KOISHI.title: Rose Hell
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_HELL_KOISHI.descripti: For every {Threshold:diff()} cards in your Exhaust pile, add 1 [gold]Rose Danmaku[/gold] to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-EMPTY_HEAD_KOISHI.title: Empty Head
KOMEIJIKOISHI-EMPTY_HEAD_KOISHI.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Randomly grant 1 card in hand [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNINTENTIONAL_DANMAKU_KOIS:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Add {Amount:diff()} random [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LOVE_TRAIN_KOISHI.title: Love Train
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LOVE_TRAIN_KOISHI.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Add 1 [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold] to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STARE_KOISHI.title: Stare
KOMEIJIKOISHI-INNER_AIM_KOISHI.title: Inner Aim
KOMEIJIKOISHI-INNER_AIM_KOISHI.descripti:
Apply {Tracing:diff()} [gold]Traced[/gold].
All 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal {KuugaPower:diff()} more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MENTAL_STELLAR_SUCCESSION_: Earth Spirit Sign: Mental Stellar Succession
For this combat, [gold]Traced[/gold]'s damage bonus is increased by {Multiplier:diff()}%.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-TURN_AROUND_DODGE_KOISHI.d:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Randomly play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DISINTEGRATING_CONSCIOUSNE:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your discard pile has an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-JOYFUL_DANCE_KOISHI.title: Joyful Dance
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_KOKORO_AND_UNCONSCI:
When you switch stances, randomly gain one effect:
[gold]Joy[/gold]: Next {JoyMaskPower:diff()} cards cost 0.
[gold]Anger[/gold]: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Sorrow[/gold]: Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Pleasure[/gold]: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ID_LIBERATION_KOISHI.title: Instinct: Id Liberation
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ID_LIBERATION_KOISHI.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Play all [gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards in hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-INSTINCT_STRIKE_KOISHI.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Choose 1 card in hand and grant it [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-INSTINCT_STRIKE_KOISHI.sel: Choose a card to grant Unconscious.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HIDDEN_CONSCIOUSNESS_KOISH:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Generate 5 random [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards and place them in your Exhaust pile.
Randomly play {Cards:diff()} [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards from your Exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BIG_HUG_KOISHI.title: Komeiji Big Hug
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BIG_HUG_KOISHI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card you played this turn was an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, this costs 1 less.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SELF_OVERFLOW_KOISHI.title: Ego Flow
[sine]Thinking way too much~[/sine] 
[sine]{IfUpgraded:show:Really, truly thinking way too much~}[/sine]
KOMEIJIKOISHI-REIMU_HELP_KOISHI.title: Reimu's Help
KOMEIJIKOISHI-REIMU_HELP_KOISHI.descript:
Whenever you draw a [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold], automatically play it.
Generate {Orbs:diff()} [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold] into your draw pile.
All [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold] deal 20% more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_PROTECTION_KOISHI.des: While in [gold]Closed[/gold] stance, Block gained is increased by {Rose:diff()}%.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-AIR_STRIKE_KOISHI.title: Void Strike
KOMEIJIKOISHI-AIR_STRIKE_KOISHI.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, if it is not in the Exhaust pile, add it to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KUUGA_STRIKE_KOISHI.title: Kuuga Strike
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KUUGA_STRIKE_KOISHI.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
All 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal {Kuuga:diff()} more damage.
Returns to hand each time you switch [gold]Stance[/gold], unless [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_ENDLESS_MIRACLE_KO: This turn, every [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card played is played again.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SECOND_NEED_KOISHI.title: Instinct: Second Need
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS_GENE_KOISHI.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Grant all cards in hand [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
For each [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card you play, this card costs {Reduction:diff()} less this combat.
For each card in your Exhaust pile, gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHIS_KNIFE_KOISHI.title: Koishi's Knife
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHIS_KNIFE_KOISHI.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Can be upgraded infinitely.
Upgrades itself on [gold]Kill[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-IN_FREEDOM_KOISHI.title: In Freedom~
KOMEIJIKOISHI-IN_FREEDOM_KOISHI.descript: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to grant [gold]Unconscious[/gold] and discard.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-IN_FREEDOM_KOISHI.selectio: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to grant Unconscious and discard.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNINTENTIONAL_HARVEST_KOIS:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Retain[/gold] your hand this turn.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SPIRITUAL_DESTRUCTION_KOIS:
Automatically generate and play X {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold]} [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold].
Generate 2X [gold]Consciousness Overflow[/gold] into your draw pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOMEIJI_DASH_KOISHI.title: Komeiji Dash
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUPER_REACTIVE_PERCEPTION_:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Randomly play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CASUAL_GAME_KOISHI.title: Casual Play
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CASUAL_GAME_KOISHI.descrip:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Randomly play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CONSCIOUS_COLLECTION_KOISH:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add 1 [gold]Consciousness Overflow[/gold] to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNDERGROUND_ROSE_KOISHI.de: Whenever you switch stances, generate and automatically play 1 [gold]Rose Danmaku[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CONSCIOUSNESS_SPIRAL_KOISH: At the start of your turn, add 1 [gold]Consciousness Rotation[/gold] to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CONSCIOUSNESS_ROTATION_KOI:
Switch your current [gold]Stance[/gold].
This card costs 1 more each time it is played this combat.
Returns to hand after being played.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-PHILOSOPHY_OF_THE_HATED_KO: Whenever you enter [gold]Closed[/gold] stance, automatically play 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SELFLESS_LOVE_KOISHI.title: Heart Sign: Selfless Love
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SELFLESS_LOVE_KOISHI.descr: For every 4 [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards generated, draw 1 card.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FLAW_OF_DN_A_KOISHI.title: Memory: Flaw of DNA
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FLAW_OF_DN_A_KOISHI.descri: All your Attack cards cost 0 and are [gold]Exhausted[/gold] after being played.
For every 2 cards in your Exhaust pile, all 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal 1 more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SPRINKLE_STAR_HEART_KOISHI:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Generate 1 [gold]Star Danmaku[/gold] and 1 [green]Heart Danmaku[/green] into the Exhaust pile.
Play all [gold]Star Danmaku[/gold] and [green]Heart Danmaku[/green] from all piles.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_RHAPSODY_PUNCH_KOISHI: Love Fist Sign: Rose Rhapsody Punch

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least 3 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards in hand, deal this damage again.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MALLET_LOVE_SIGN_KOISHI.ti: Mallet Love Sign: Gold Coins Clink
KOMEIJIKOISHI-MALLET_LOVE_SIGN_KOISHI.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
For each unblocked hit, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BRAMBLY_ROSE_GARDEN_KOISHI:
Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
At the start of your turn, double your [gold]Thorns[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FREUDIAN_KOISHI.title: Instinct: Freudian Theory
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FREUDIAN_KOISHI.descriptio: For each [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card in hand, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CONFINED_INNOCENT_KOISHI.d:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Each time you switch [gold]Stance[/gold], this card's [gold]Block[/gold] increases by {Magic:diff()} for this combat.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEARTWARD_STRIKE_KOISHI.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enter [gold]Closed[/gold] stance.
Move 1 [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card from your discard pile to the top of your draw pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEARTWARD_STRIKE_KOISHI.se: Choose an Unconscious card to put on top of your draw pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DEATH_DRIVE_KOISHI.title: Destruction Sign: Death Drive
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DEATH_DRIVE_KOISHI.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Each time you switch [gold]Stance[/gold], this card attacks 1 additional time this combat.
